title: potentilla gracilis var. flabelliformis
intro: Potentilla gracilis var. flabelliformis, also known as the delicate cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Potentilla gracilis var. flabelliformis include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues.
